directive: C4352: Sage #349/#350 SHIPPED (10f0c02 filter chips + 395525c PDP gallery tap-to-play video + pinch zoom 1×–4×). Bolt continues #336 P4.2 — Bolt's C4351 uncommitted WIP (email-dispatch.ts + worker-email updates + checkout/admin actions) is NOT in HEAD (git tree clean, those files don't exist). Re-do and COMMIT the refactor this cycle: Server Actions (order-confirmation Resend emails, invoice PDF gen, Packeta SOAP createPacket) → enqueue onto emailQueue/invoiceQueue/packetaQueue. Replace __smoke-job branches in src/workers/worker-*.ts with real dispatch. Commit incrementally as each queue goes green. Trace → #324 Vinted residue grep (quick) then #337 queue integration tests. Sage → cart free-shipping progress bar + inline checkout trust badges (C1496 spec: Comgate logo + lock icon + 'Zabezpečená platba' inline with payment form, max 3). Guard → #330 nginx hardening review.

BOLT.notes: P4.1 #335 SHIPPED C4347 (commit 56c76d4 — BullMQ infrastructure live: 3 queues, 3 workers with shared IORedis, hardened systemd units, SIGTERM drain). NEXT: #336 P4.2 refactor 3 Server Actions to enqueue real work: (a) order-confirmation email flow (currently inline Resend send from checkout submit Server Action) → emailQueue job: {to, template, data} — replace __smoke-job branch in workers/email.ts with switch on template type dispatching to the 11 Resend senders already wired; (b) invoice PDF generation (post-payment webhook creates + emails PDF) → invoiceQueue job: {orderId} — worker loads order, generates PDF via existing lib, uploads to R2 (once credentials live) OR stores tmp path, attaches to follow-up email via emailQueue; (c) Packeta SOAP createPacket (on order ship action) → packetaQueue job: {orderId} — worker invokes SOAP client, stores packetId on Order, enqueues label-ready email. Server Actions keep their return shapes (success=job enqueued); admin/user polls job status via a new lightweight /api/jobs/[id] route if needed. Then #344 P7.1 UptimeRobot /api/health + Telegram (jarvis-bot chat_id 8750673812, token in JARVIS DB 'telegram-bot'). Then #345 P7.2 Hetzner threshold alerts + PM2 log rotation. #348 runbook docs anytime build is red. #329 certbot STAYS BLOCKED until bectly flips DNS → 46.224.219.3. Ref: docs/migration/hetzner-all.md Phase 4/7.

GUARD.notes: UNBLOCKED C4345. Audit #330: review docs/migration/nginx/janicka-shop.conf (repo copy of /etc/nginx/sites-available/janicka-shop.conf on kryxon). Check: (1) security headers (HSTS pending SSL but scaffold ready, X-Frame-Options DENY, X-Content-Type-Options nosniff, Referrer-Policy strict-origin-when-cross-origin, CSP with frame-src comgate.eu per Comgate inline gate 504×679px spec, Permissions-Policy); (2) server_tokens off; (3) rate limiting on /api/auth + /api/dev-chat (limit_req_zone, e.g. 10r/s); (4) 20M body cap scoped to /api/uploadthing* only, default 1M elsewhere; (5) proxy header sanitization — strip incoming X-Forwarded-*, set trusted values server-side via real_ip_header; (6) TLS hardening checklist ready (TLS 1.2+ only, HSTS max-age=63072000 includeSubDomains preload, OCSP stapling, ssl_session_cache) for when certbot runs post-DNS-flip. Deliverable: findings list + concrete diff suggestions in docs/migration/nginx/nginx-hardening-review.md.
